---
title: "FAQ"
---

### What tools and libraries do you use most often?

Python tools:

- pandas  
- numpy  
- matplotlib  
- beautifulsoup  
- sqlite3  

R tools:

- tidyverse  
- ggplot2  

Other tools:

- Git / GitHub  
- SQLite  
- Quarto  
- Kaggle datasets  

### What kinds of internships are you looking for?
I’m interested in internships related to:

- data science  
- data analytics  
- machine learning  
- software engineering  

### Favorite Interstate Highway?
I-49.

### What industries interest you?
I’m interested in industries where data is used to improve things such as:

- technology  
- finance  
- healthcare  
- consumer analytics  
- public policy  

### What skills are you currently working on improving?
Right now I’m focusing on improving my skills in:

- statistical analysis  
- machine learning  
- data pipelines  
- data visualization  

### Are you open to collaboration?
Yes. I enjoy working on projects with others and learning new techniques.

### What was the first programming language you learned?
Python.

### What is your favorite project you’ve built?
Soundtrack Safeguard is one of my favorites because it solved an actual problem. My teacher had asked us to do it.

### Pineapple on pizza?
Pineapple might be the best topping possible on pizza.

### How can someone contact you?
You can reach me through:

- GitHub: https://github.com/Lucas-Gates  
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lucascgates-/
- Email: lucascgates@gmail.com
